creator: tom@misery.sdf.com
text:
There is no manpage for ndbm.  /usr/include/ndbm.h has a reference to 
"ndbm(3)", but there is no manpage in that section, or anywhere else.

Fix: 

Include manpage from somewhere.  If no material is available, the pages
from sdbm could be used (with small modifications).
How-To-Repeat: 
  man 3 ndbm
  man ndbm
